FIRE198 FIRE SEMESTER 2 (2 Credits)

This is the second course in the FIRE (First-Year Innovation & Research Experience) program sequence. Students in this course join a research stream and gain discipline-specific training in that lab. This course focuses on the concepts related to the process of independent research including collaboration with peers, communication of

ideas, troubleshooting unexpected outcomes, and discipline-specific methodologies.
